OmniScript.description: Omni Script to capture Food Premise Operating Permit request from Operating Portal.
OmniScript.name: PHOCS Personal Service Establishment Health Approval

childElements.name: TextBlock1
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "
\n
\n
\n

Thank you. Your application has been submitted successfully. Application Number: %BLAApplicationId%

\n

 

\n
\n
\n
", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: AcknowledgementStep
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Acknowledgement", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "", "previousWidth" : "0", "nextLabel" : "Close", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "ariaLevel" : 2, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: ParentAccount__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Applicant", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : "", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: PHOCSApplicationDescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Description", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: PrimaryOwnerLookup
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Primary Owner", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : true, "defaultValue" : "", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "dataSource" : { "type" : "SObject", "mapItems" : { "phase1MapItems" : [ { "InterfaceObjectName__c" : "Contact", "InterfaceFieldAPIName__c" : "AccountId", "FilterOperator__c" : "=", "FilterValue__c" : "searchKey", "InterfaceObjectLookupOrder__c" : 1, "DomainObjectFieldAPIName__c" : "contactObj" } ], "phase2MapItems" : [ { "DomainObjectFieldAPIName__c" : "name", "InterfaceFieldAPIName__c" : "contactObj:Id", "DomainObjectAPIName__c" : "JSON", "DomainObjectCreationOrder__c" : 1 }, { "DomainObjectFieldAPIName__c" : "value", "InterfaceFieldAPIName__c" : "contactObj:Name", "DomainObjectAPIName__c" : "JSON", "DomainObjectCreationOrder__c" : 1 } ], "inputParameters" : [ { "element" : "BusinessEntityAccountId", "inputParam" : "searchKey" } ] } }, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "clearValue" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: ReviewApplicationDescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Description", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ApplicationDetailsStep
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Application Details", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "ariaLevel" : 2, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: DataMapperExtractLogInUserId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Data Mapper - Extract LogIn UserId", "bundle" : "PHOCSDMExtractLogInUserId", "ignoreCache" : true, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "userId", "inputParam" : "captureId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: ServiceAreaReview__c
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Service Area Review", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "SObject", "source" : "Account.ServiceAreaReview__c" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }
